Document:
# Side Knowledge
Allows you to transmute a heart and a flare into a [color=red]Seeking Heart[/color].
When activated, its beat will quicken in proximity of an [color=#8f63e6]Eldritch Tome[/color].
Allows you to transmute a pair of eyes, a light bulb, and a crowbar into a [color=red]Wildering Mirror[/color].
The [color=red]Wildering Mirror[/color] has a high chance to reflect energy weapons, such as disablers, when held.
Allows you to transmute an ID card and any organ into a [color=red]Frangiclave[/color].
The [color=red]Frangiclave[/color] will destroy any inanimate object it's thrown at.
Allows you to transmute a table and a gas mask to create [color=red]Ominous Armor[/color].
[color=red]Ominous Armor[/color] provides great protection while also acting as a [color=#8f63e6]Focus[/color] when the hood is flipped up.
Allows you to transmute a water tank and a shard of glass into an [color=red]Eldritch Flask[/color].
This flask contains a mixture of Omnizine and Tranexamic Acid, healing one of most damage and stopping one's bleeding.
